name: Direct standard landmark
definition: Same landmark definition and measurement posture as the protocol standard.

name: Biologically comparable landmark
definition: Landmark is not identical but maps to a documented species-equivalent structure.
filter_rule: include in primary analysis only if pre-specified

name: Comparable alternate landmark
definition: Alternate endpoint likely captures the same developmental axis but is not protocol-standard.

name: Approximate proxy
definition: Proxy, literature-derived, or inferred measurement with limited comparability.

name: Unusable or ambiguous
definition: Landmark or method is too ambiguous for scientific comparison.
